summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements but has several notable gaps. The backend is missing full CRUD operations (update/delete for projects, tasks, and clients), the frontend edit/delete flows for projects and clients are incomplete or non-functional, the dedicated Tasks page/route is absent, and task editing is not supported. The sidebar is also missing a Tasks navigation item.

missing_requirements.requirement: User can edit any project field (not just status); User can delete a project
missing_requirements.reason: The backend only exposes updateProjectStatus (not a full project update) and no deleteProject function is visible. The frontend Projects.tsx handleEdit only calls updateStatus mutation, not a full field update. No delete project functionality is present.

missing_requirements.requirement: User can edit a task; User can delete a task
missing_requirements.reason: TaskForm only supports creating tasks with no edit mode. No deleteTask backend function or frontend delete flow is visible. TaskItem only supports toggling done status.

missing_requirements.requirement: User can edit and delete client records
missing_requirements.reason: The Clients.tsx page explicitly states client editing is not supported and shows a toast.info instead of performing an update. No updateClient or deleteClient backend function is implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Upcoming tasks are listed with due dates on the dashboard
missing_requirements.reason: The Dashboard shows upcoming projects by end date, not tasks with due dates. There is no task-level listing on the dashboard.

missing_requirements.requirement: Persistent left sidebar navigation with icons for Dashboard, Projects, Tasks, and Clients
missing_requirements.reason: The Sidebar only has three nav items: Dashboard, Projects, and Clients. A dedicated Tasks navigation item and route are missing entirely.

hallucinated_features.description: A footer with a caffeine.ai branding link is added to the Layout component
hallucinated_features.reason: No such footer or external branding link was requested in the build specification.
